candidate_grammar.boundary: All measurement relations assembled from admitted Fold distinctions, exact reference pairing, held observation records, target-inaccessible execution and finite generated support.

a conventional unit, equation or measured constant selecting the Fold relation

statement: A physical quantity is forced as the equivalence class of observations comparable through one generated kind-preserving reference relation; its measured value is a separate record, not the quantity itself.
title: Physical quantity as reference-equivalence carrier
